Unsourced material may be challenged and removed. *Find sources:* ["Bed and breakfast"](https://www.google.com/search?as_eq=wikipedia&q=%22Bed+and+breakfast%22) – [news](https://www.google.com/search?tbm=nws&q=%22Bed+and+breakfast%22+-wikipedia&tbs=ar:1) **·** [newspapers](https://www.google.com/search?&q=%22Bed+and+breakfast%22&tbs=bkt:s&tbm=bks) **·** [books](https://www.google.com/search?tbs=bks:1&q=%22Bed+and+breakfast%22+-wikipedia) **·** [scholar](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=%22Bed+and+breakfast%22) **·** [JSTOR](https://www.jstor.org/action/doBasicSearch?Query=%22Bed+and+breakfast%22&acc=on&wc=on) *(August 2020)* *([Learn how and when to remove this message](/wiki/Help:Maintenance_template_removal "Help:Maintenance template removal"))*

[newspapers](https://www.google.com/search?&q=%22Bed+and+breakfast%22&tbs=bkt:s&tbm=bks) **·** [books](https://www.google.com/search?tbs=bks:1&q=%22Bed+and+breakfast%22+-wikipedia) **·** [scholar](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=%22Bed+and+breakfast%22) **·** [JSTOR](https://www.jstor.org/action/doBasicSearch?Query=%22Bed+and+breakfast%22&acc=on&wc=on) *(August 2020)* *([Learn how and when to remove this message](/wiki/Help:Maintenance_template_removal "Help:Maintenance template removal"))* |

(typically shortened to **B&B** or **BnB**) is a small [lodging](/wiki/Lodging "Lodging") establishment that offers overnight accommodation and breakfast. In addition, a B&B sometimes has the hosts living in the house.

["Bed and Breakfast Accommodation in Australia - Market Size, Industry Analysis, Trends and Forecasts (2024-2029)| IBISWorld"](https://www.ibisworld.com/au/industry/bed-breakfast-accommodation/5376/#IndustryStatisticsAndTrends).

Mike Ives (13 August 2013). ["From Outsiders to Innkeepers in China's Sleepy Countryside"](https://www.nytimes.com/2013/08/14/business/global/in-chinas-countryside-travelers-find-foreigner-run-hotels.html). *The New York Times*. Retrieved 14 August 2013.

["Guidelines For Approval and Registration of 'Incredible India Bed And Breakfast' Establishments"](https://web.archive.org/web/20101222171109/http://tourism.gov.in/guidelines/Incredible%20India%20Bed%26%20Breakfast%20Scheme.doc). *Tourism.gov India*. 7 November 2006. Archived from [the original](http://tourism.gov.in/guidelines/Incredible%20India%20Bed%26%20Breakfast%20Scheme.doc) on 22 December 2010. Retrieved 24 July 2009. (MS Word Document download)

["Delhi tourism department promoting B&Bs in Delhi"](https://web.archive.org/web/20090814072027/http://delhitourism.nic.in/publicpage/bb.html). *Delhitourism.nic.in*. Archived from [the original](http://delhitourism.nic.in/publicpage/bb.html) on 14 August 2009. Retrieved 1 October 2017.

["Ministry of Tourism B&B criteria in Delhi"](https://web.archive.org/web/20100525040818/http://delhitourism.nic.in/downloads/B%26BRuleandapplicationform.doc). *Delhitourism.nic.in*. Archived from [the original](http://delhitourism.nic.in/downloads/B&BRuleandapplicationform.doc) on 25 May 2010. Retrieved 1 October 2017.

["The full Irish: how B&Bs bounced back"](https://www.irishtimes.com/life-and-style/travel/ireland/the-full-irish-how-b-bs-bounced-back-1.3423944), *[Irish Times](/wiki/Irish_Times "Irish Times")*, retrieved 28 July 2023

["B&Bs and Historic Houses | Quality Assurance"](https://www.failteireland.ie/Supports/registration-and-grading/national-quality-assurance-framework/irish-home-b-b.aspx.), *[Fáilte Ireland](/wiki/F%C3%A1ilte_Ireland "Fáilte Ireland")*, retrieved 28 July 2023

Mirovsky, Arik. ["There's gold in them thar hills..."](https://web.archive.org/web/20081222060331/http://www.haaretz.com/hasen/pages/ShArt.jhtml?itemNo=656508&contrassID=2&subContrassID=10&sbSubContrassID=0&listSrc=Y) *[Haaretz](/wiki/Haaretz "Haaretz")*. Archived from [the original](https://www.haaretz.com/hasen/pages/ShArt.jhtml?itemNo=656508&contrassID=2&subContrassID=10&sbSubContrassID=0&listSrc=Y) on 22 December 2008. Retrieved 5 April 2009.

Ferrero, Michela (27 May 2013). ["Normativa italiana e leggi per aprire un Bed and Breakfast"](https://web.archive.org/web/20160826002435/http://it.bedandbreakfasteuro.com/normativa-italiana-e-leggi-per-aprire-un-bed-and-breakfast/). *Bed and Breakfast in Europe – Italy* (in Italian). Archived from [the original](http://it.bedandbreakfasteuro.com/normativa-italiana-e-leggi-per-aprire-un-bed-and-breakfast/) on 26 August 2016. Retrieved 1 October 2017.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Small lodging establishment

For other uses, see [Bed & Breakfast (disambiguation)](/wiki/Bed_%26_Breakfast_(disambiguation) "Bed & Breakfast (disambiguation)").

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [icon](/wiki/File:Question_book-new.svg) | This article **needs additional citations for [verification](/wiki/Wikipedia:Verifiability "Wikipedia:Verifiability")**. Please help [improve this article](/wiki/Special:EditPage/Bed_and_breakfast "Special:EditPage/Bed and breakfast") by [adding citations to reliable sources](/wiki/Help:Referencing_for_beginners "Help:Referencing for beginners"). Unsourced material may be challenged and removed. *Find sources:* ["Bed and breakfast"](https://www.google.com/search?as_eq=wikipedia&q=%22Bed+and+breakfast%22) – [news](https://www.google.com/search?tbm=nws&q=%22Bed+and+breakfast%22+-wikipedia&tbs=ar:1) **·** [newspapers](https://www.google.com/search?&q=%22Bed+and+breakfast%22&tbs=bkt:s&tbm=bks) **·** [books](https://www.google.com/search?tbs=bks:1&q=%22Bed+and+breakfast%22+-wikipedia) **·** [scholar](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=%22Bed+and+breakfast%22) **·** [JSTOR](https://www.jstor.org/action/doBasicSearch?Query=%22Bed+and+breakfast%22&acc=on&wc=on) *(August 2020)* *([Learn how and when to remove this message](/wiki/Help:Maintenance_template_removal "Help:Maintenance template removal"))* |

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/27/Day173abfastg.JPG/250px-Day173abfastg.JPG)](/wiki/File:Day173abfastg.JPG)

Breakfast at a B&B in [Quebec City](/wiki/Quebec_City "Quebec City"), Canada

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/9a/Elbe_1_-_B%C3%BCrgermeister_O%C2%B4Swald_II_--_Ystad-2017.jpg/250px-Elbe_1_-_B%C3%BCrgermeister_O%C2%B4Swald_II_--_Ystad-2017.jpg)](/wiki/File:Elbe_1_-_B%C3%BCrgermeister_O%C2%B4Swald_II_--_Ystad-2017.jpg)

The ship *Bürgermeister O´Swald II* is now a B&B in the port of [Cuxhaven](/wiki/Cuxhaven "Cuxhaven").

A **bed and breakfast** (typically shortened to **B&B** or **BnB**) is a small [lodging](/wiki/Lodging "Lodging") establishment that offers overnight accommodation and breakfast. In addition, a B&B sometimes has the hosts living in the house.

*Bed and breakfast* is also used to describe the level of catering included in a hotel's room prices, as opposed to room-only, [half-board, or full-board](/wiki/Room_and_board "Room and board").

## International differences

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bed_and_breakfast&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: International differences")]

### Australia

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bed_and_breakfast&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Australia")]

There are approximately 7,000 B&Bs in Australia.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

The B&B industry in Australia generates about $132 million in annual revenue.

### China

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bed_and_breakfast&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: China")]

In China, expatriates have remodeled traditional structures in quiet picturesque rural areas and opened a few rustic boutique hotels with minimum amenities. Most patrons are foreign tourists but they are growing in popularity among Chinese domestic tourists.[[2]](#cite_note-NYT81313-2)

### India

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bed_and_breakfast&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: India")]

In the lead-up to the [2010 Commonwealth Games](/wiki/2010_Commonwealth_Games "2010 Commonwealth Games") in Delhi, the government of India promoted the concept of bed & breakfast[[3]](#cite_note-3) as an effort to increase tourism, especially keeping in view the demand for hotels.[[4]](#cite_note-4) All B&Bs must be approved by the Ministry of Tourism, which will then categorize them as Gold or Silver based on a list of predefined criteria.[[5]](#cite_note-5)

### Ireland

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bed_and_breakfast&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Ireland")]

In Ireland, B&Bs can be townhouses, farmhouses, or country houses. There are about 3,000 B&Bs[[6]](#cite_note-6) spread throughout the country, 750 of which are certified for meeting quality standards by [Fáilte Ireland](/wiki/F%C3%A1ilte_Ireland "Fáilte Ireland").[[7]](#cite_note-7)

### Israel

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bed_and_breakfast&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: Israel")]

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/7/76/ZIMMER_IN_GALILEE_INSIDE_VIEW_ITAMAR_GRINBERG_IMOT_%2813997832348%29.jpg/250px-ZIMMER_IN_GALILEE_INSIDE_VIEW_ITAMAR_GRINBERG_IMOT_%2813997832348%29.jpg)](/wiki/File:ZIMMER_IN_GALILEE_INSIDE_VIEW_ITAMAR_GRINBERG_IMOT_(13997832348).jpg)

Rural tourism in Israel includes accommodations ranging from basic converted buildings to luxurious log cabins (Zimmers) equipped with modern amenities.

The Israeli B&B is known as a *zimmer* (German for 'room'). All over the country, but especially in northern Israel (Galilee and Upper Galilee), the *zimmer* has developed into an extensive industry. This industry began to develop in the 1990s, when agriculture became less profitable, and many families with farms in moshavim, [kibbutzim](/wiki/Kibbutz "Kibbutz"), farms, and even in cities decided to try their luck in the business of hospitality. In the last decade, bed and breakfasts have also emerged in southern Israel's [Negev](/wiki/Negev "Negev") region.[[8]](#cite_note-8)[[9]](#cite_note-9)

### Italy

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bed_and_breakfast&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: Italy")]

In Italy, regional law regulates B&Bs. There is a national law "Legge 29 marzo 2001, n. 135" but each region maintains a specific regulation. Each region can adopt different regulations but they must observe the national law on Tourism (Law N° 135 /2001).[[10]](#cite_note-10)

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/3/32/Carriage_BandB_Hinto_Panzio_in_Transylvania%2C_Odorheiu-Secuiesc%2C_Romania.png/250px-Carriage_BandB_Hinto_Panzio_in_Transylvania%2C_Odorheiu-Secuiesc%2C_Romania.png)](/wiki/File:Carriage_BandB_Hinto_Panzio_in_Transylvania,_Odorheiu-Secuiesc,_Romania.png)

Carriage B&B Hinto Panzio in [Transylvania](/wiki/Transylvania "Transylvania"), Odorheiu Secuiesc, Romania

### Japan

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bed_and_breakfast&action=edit&section=8 "Edit section: Japan")]

The Japanese equivalent of this sort of hospitality business is the [*minshuku*](/wiki/Ryokan#Minshuku "Ryokan"), which offers dinner as well as bed & breakfast in the tradition of the *[ryokan](/wiki/Ryokan "Ryokan")*.[[11]](#cite_note-11)[[12]](#cite_note-12)

### United Kingdom

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bed_and_breakfast&action=edit&section=9 "Edit section: United Kingdom")]

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/2b/Little_Langford_Farmhouse_Bed_and_Breakfast_-_geograph.org.uk_-_327034.jpg/250px-Little_Langford_Farmhouse_Bed_and_Breakfast_-_geograph.org.uk_-_327034.jpg)](/wiki/File:Little_Langford_Farmhouse_Bed_and_Breakfast_-_geograph.org.uk_-_327034.jpg)

Little Langford Farmhouse, [Salisbury](/wiki/Salisbury "Salisbury"), Wiltshire

There are numerous B&Bs found in seaside towns, the countryside as well as city centers.[[13]](#cite_note-13)[[14]](#cite_note-14)

B&Bs are graded by [VisitBritain](/wiki/VisitBritain "VisitBritain") and [the AA](/wiki/The_AA "The AA") on a star system. 3-, 4- and 5-star establishments have a higher standard.[[15]](#cite_note-15)[[16]](#cite_note-16) A majority of B&Bs in the UK have [en suite](/wiki/En_suite "En suite") facilities.

### United States

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bed_and_breakfast&action=edit&section=10 "Edit section: United States")]

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/a/a5/Dupont_at_the_Circle_B%26B.JPG/250px-Dupont_at_the_Circle_B%26B.JPG)](/wiki/File:Dupont_at_the_Circle_B%26B.JPG)

Front yard of a B&B in the [Dupont Circle](/wiki/Dupont_Circle "Dupont Circle") neighborhood of Washington, D.C.

There are approximately 17,000 B&Bs in the United States.[[17]](#cite_note-The_B&B_Industry-17) Bed and breakfasts are often private family homes and typically have between four and eleven rooms, with six being the average.[[17]](#cite_note-The_B&B_Industry-17)

## See also

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bed_and_breakfast&action=edit&section=11 "Edit section: See also")]

* [![icon](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/94/Map_Icon_-_Hotel.png/40px-Map_Icon_-_Hotel.png)](/wiki/File:Map_Icon_-_Hotel.png)[Hotels portal](/wiki/Portal:Hotels "Portal:Hotels")

* [Airbnb](/wiki/Airbnb "Airbnb")
